summary: ANDROID 🟥 DSDK DFU for sub devices doesnt work
scenario: Poly Studio Mobile app crashes when starting CC or CS sub-device firmware update (DFU)
description_clean: App crashes whenever CC or CS DFU (Device Firmware Update for sub-devices) is started.
steps: Open Poly Studio Mobile app on Android
Connect a Poly CC or CS Bluetooth audio device
Go to Device Settings for the connected device
Locate and start a Device Firmware Update (DFU) for the sub-device (CC or CS)
Observe the app behavior during the DFU process
expected: The app should remain stable and display the DFU progress (e.g., downloading/installing firmware) without crashing.
actual: The Poly Studio Mobile app crashes (closes unexpectedly) as soon as the CC or CS sub-device DFU is started.
